subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath perfected the Word and sent down His grace, which in the first station is the House [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اتم الکلمه و انزل النعمه و هی فی الرتبه الاولی البیت الذی
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
